channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped IKEA Packing, 20th March
item.description:
Someone, postcode SE7 8HP visible on rubbish, has dumped their IKEA packing in Fletching Road. It is possible that there is an address somewhere on the packing. I could only see the postcode which relates to Guild Road, Charlton.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodmore Mews, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at flat binstore, 20th March
item.description:
Other streets are now using a bin store at the end of Canada Road to dump their rubbish. The bin store has a code lock and it is sometimes left open but as you can see the outside wall is being piled high with rubbish. One item had a clear address (photo) left in past 1-2days. Fly tipping here is constant and the residents of 35-85 canada road (flats) are the ones who are blamed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further flytipping outside Travellers site, 20th March
item.description:
Further flytipping outside Travellers site at junction of Star Lane and Sweeps Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sweeps Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A dead animal on the pavement, 20th March
item.description:
A cat was ran over earlier today. Someone moved it to the pavement and co ered with pink blanket.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hornfair Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen over, 20th March
item.description:
Tree has fallen down from Langley Park Golf Course onto Hawksbrook Lane. Branches from tree is partially blocking the road and looks to be close to completely collapsing onto the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawksbrook Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 20th March
item.description:
Address removed from package

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coronation court, 20th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenilworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: 20 inch long, 10 inch wide, deep in middle of road, 20th March
item.description:
Been here for over a month and a trip hazard, danger of driving in to it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5FT long pavement obstruction, 20th March
item.description:
Spoke with Javan yesterday regarding this. Please send someone as an 'urgent request as the teenagers are now using this as a "BMX bike run" and someone will get hurt. The bark chippings are now all over the pavement/road and the hump needs to be removed for the safety of pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homemead Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor road surface - deteriorating, 20th March
item.description:
I reported this before. The council says it is "fixed", but none of the potholes are fixed and the surface is worse. The road surface is very poor on the inside of the bend and near the junction with Pelham road. Many potholes which are getting worse each day, forcing cars to drive over the central line in order to avoid damaging their cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular waste disposal by church, 20th March
item.description:
The members of the church frequently dispose of rubbish on the corner of St Marks Rise and Colvestone Crescent despite having bins in their car park. It encourages others to do the same which means the corner is always full of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Marks Rise, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish in the street, 20th March
item.description:
Furniture, white good, mattress for at least one week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timber Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip behind utility boxes, 20th March
item.description:
Fly tip behind these utility boxes next to bus station. Car seat, wood, sign, plastic. Been here weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 20th March
item.description:
This bit of road outside tesco and travelodge is full of litter. Hasn’t been cleaned or swept for weeks! Caked in mud and rubbish. Needs urgent attention

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulk waste left in shared garden, 20th March
item.description:
Big plastic box left in shared garden and had not been collected by council on collection day. It’s blocking access to residents’ bins. Bern there for almost two weeks now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colvestone Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 20th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homemead Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish around parade of shops, 20th March
item.description:
Loads of litter in parking area and dumped in flower beds - needs clearing!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croxted Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge damaged, 20th March
item.description:
The grass verge outside 214 Willow Road has been destroyed by vehicle's driving over it to get onto the property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willow Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood left on pavement, 20th March
item.description:
Various items on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avocet Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Tree Branch obstructing pavement, N20 9HD, 20th March
item.description:
Broken Tree Branch obstructing pavement in Oakleigh Park North, N20 9HD (outside The Hollies)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Oakleigh Park North, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
